arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

arabic: إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ
english: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.

arabic: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ
english: Guide us to the straight path.

arabic: وَاسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى الْخَاشِعِينَ
english: And seek help through patience and prayer, and indeed, it is difficult except for the humbly submissive.

arabic: فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِي وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
english: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ
english: O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

arabic: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُم بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ الْأَمْوَالِ وَالْأَنفُسِ وَالثَّمَرَاتِ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ الصَّابِرِينَ
english: And We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger and a loss of wealth and lives and fruits, but give good tidings to the patient.

arabic: الَّذِينَ إِذَا أَصَابَتْهُم مُّصِيبَةٌ قَالُوا إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ
english: Who, when disaster strikes them, say: Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return.

arabic: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ ۖ أُجِيبُ دَعْوَةَ الدَّاعِ إِذَا دَعَانِ
english: And when My servants ask you concerning Me — indeed I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.

arabic: وَعَسَىٰ أَن تَكْرَهُوا شَيْئًا وَهُوَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ ۖ وَعَسَىٰ أَن تُحِبُّوا شَيْئًا وَهُوَ شَرٌّ لَّكُمْ
english: But perhaps you hate a thing and it is good for you; and perhaps you love a thing and it is bad for you.

arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
english: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence.

arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
english: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.

arabic: الَّذِينَ يُنفِقُونَ فِي السَّرَّاءِ وَالضَّرَّاءِ وَالْكَاظِمِينَ الْغَيْظَ وَالْعَافِينَ عَنِ النَّاسِ ۗ وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english: Those who spend in ease and adversity and who restrain anger and who pardon the people — and Allah loves the doers of good.

arabic: وَلَا تَهِنُوا وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا وَأَنتُمُ الْأَعْلَوْنَ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
english: So do not weaken and do not grieve, and you will be superior if you are believers.

arabic: إِن يَنصُرْكُمُ اللَّهُ فَلَا غَالِبَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِن يَخْذُلْكُمْ فَمَن ذَا الَّذِي يَنصُرُكُم مِّن بَعْدِهِ
english: If Allah should aid you, no one can overcome you; but if He should forsake you, who is there that can aid you after Him?

arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
english: Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَائِقَةُ الْمَوْتِ
english: Every soul will taste death.

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اصْبِرُوا وَصَابِرُوا وَرَابِطُوا وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
english: O you who have believed, persevere and endure and remain stationed and fear Allah that you may be successful.

arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ سُوءًا أَوْ يَظْلِمْ نَفْسَهُ ثُمَّ يَسْتَغْفِرِ اللَّهَ يَجِدِ اللَّهَ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
english: And whoever does a wrong or wrongs himself but then seeks forgiveness of Allah will find Allah Forgiving and Merciful.

arabic: كَتَبَ رَبُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِ الرَّحْمَةَ
english: Your Lord has decreed upon Himself mercy.

arabic: إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ اللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english: Indeed, the mercy of Allah is near to the doers of good.

arabic: وَلِلَّهِ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَىٰ فَادْعُوهُ بِهَا
english: And to Allah belong the best names, so invoke Him by them.

arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا هُوَ مَوْلَانَا
english: Say: Never will we be struck except by what Allah has decreed for us; He is our protector.

arabic: وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتُ بَعْضُهُمْ أَوْلِيَاءُ بَعْضٍ
english: The believing men and believing women are allies of one another.

arabic: أَلَا إِنَّ أَوْلِيَاءَ اللَّهِ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
english: Unquestionably, indeed the allies of Allah — there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

arabic: إِنَّ رَبِّي رَحِيمٌ وَدُودٌ
english: Indeed, my Lord is Merciful and Loving.

arabic: وَاصْبِرْ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english: And be patient, for indeed Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.

arabic: إِنَّهُ لَا يَيْأَسُ مِن رَّوْحِ اللَّهِ إِلَّا الْقَوْمُ الْكَافِرُونَ
english: Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.

arabic: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
english: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

arabic: لَئِن شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ ۖ وَلَئِن كَفَرْتُمْ إِنَّ عَذَابِي لَشَدِيدٌ
english: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you in favor. But if you deny, indeed My punishment is severe.

arabic: نَبِّئْ عِبَادِي أَنِّي أَنَا الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
english: Inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.

arabic: الَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
english: Those who are patient and upon their Lord rely.

arabic: مَنْ عَمِلَ صَالِحًا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوْ أُنثَىٰ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَنُحْيِيَنَّهُ حَيَاةً طَيِّبَةً
english: Whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while being a believer — We will surely cause him to live a good life.

arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الَّذِينَ اتَّقَوا وَّالَّذِينَ هُم مُّحْسِنُونَ
english: Indeed, Allah is with those who fear Him and those who are doers of good.

arabic: رَّبُّكُمْ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا فِي نُفُوسِكُمْ
english: Your Lord is most knowing of what is within yourselves.

arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ وَاجْعَل لِّي مِن لَّدُنكَ سُلْطَانًا نَّصِيرًا
english: And say: My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and to exit a sound exit and grant me from Yourself a supporting authority.

arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
english: Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us from our affair right guidance.

arabic: الْمَالُ وَالْبَنُونَ زِينَةُ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا ۖ وَالْبَاقِيَاتُ الصَّالِحَاتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ
english: Wealth and children are the adornment of worldly life. But the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord.

arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
english: And say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

arabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَاصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا
english: And enjoin prayer upon your family and be steadfast therein.

arabic: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
english: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

arabic: وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعَالَمِينَ
english: And We have not sent you except as a mercy to the worlds.

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ارْكَعُوا وَاسْجُدُوا وَاعْبُدُوا رَبَّكُمْ وَافْعَلُوا الْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
english: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good — that you may succeed.

arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
english: Certainly will the believers have succeeded.

arabic: اللَّهُ نُورُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
english: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth.

arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا فَأُولَٰئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ اللَّهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ حَسَنَاتٍ
english: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good.

arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
english: Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader for the righteous.

arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ السُّوءَ
english: Who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil.

arabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَٰكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَهْدِي مَن يَشَاءُ
english: Indeed, you do not guide whom you love, but Allah guides whom He wills.

arabic: وَأَحْسِن كَمَا أَحْسَنَ اللَّهُ إِلَيْكَ
english: And do good as Allah has done good to you.

arabic: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنكَرِ ۗ وَلَذِكْرُ اللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ
english: Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing, and the remembrance of Allah is greater.

arabic: وَالَّذِينَ جَاهَدُوا فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا ۚ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ لَمَعَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
english: And those who strive for Us — We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allah is with the doers of good.

arabic: يَا بُنَيَّ أَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ وَأْمُرْ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَانْهَ عَنِ الْمُنكَرِ وَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا أَصَابَكَ
english: O my son, establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid what is wrong, and be patient over what befalls you.

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ ذِكْرًا كَثِيرًا
english: O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance.

arabic: وَكَانَ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَحِيمًا
english: And ever is He, to the believers, Merciful.

arabic: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَأَقَامُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَأَنفَقُوا مِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ سِرًّا وَعَلَانِيَةً يَرْجُونَ تِجَارَةً لَّن تَبُورَ
english: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend from what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, expect a transaction that will never perish.

arabic: إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى الصَّابِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
english: Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account.

arabic: لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِن رَّحْمَةِ اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا
english: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins.

arabic: وَأُفَوِّضُ أَمْرِي إِلَى اللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَصِيرٌ بِالْعِبَادِ
english: And I entrust my affair to Allah. Indeed, Allah is Seeing of servants.

arabic: ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
english: Call upon Me; I will respond to you.

arabic: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ قَالُوا رَبُّنَا اللَّهُ ثُمَّ اسْتَقَامُوا تَتَنَزَّلُ عَلَيْهِمُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ أَلَّا تَخَافُوا وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا
english: Indeed, those who have said: Our Lord is Allah, and then remained steadfast — the angels will descend upon them: Do not fear and do not grieve.

arabic: وَهُوَ الَّذِي يَقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ وَيَعْفُو عَنِ السَّيِّئَاتِ
english: And it is He who accepts repentance from His servants and pardons misdeeds.

arabic: وَلَمَن صَبَرَ وَغَفَرَ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمِنْ عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ
english: And whoever is patient and forgives — indeed, that is of the matters requiring resolve.

arabic: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ حَتَّىٰ نَعْلَمَ الْمُجَاهِدِينَ مِنكُمْ وَالصَّابِرِينَ
english: And We will surely test you until We make evident those who strive among you and the patient.

arabic: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ
english: The believers are but brothers.

arabic: وَلَا تَجَسَّسُوا وَلَا يَغْتَب بَّعْضُكُم بَعْضًا
english: And do not spy or backbite each other.

arabic: إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ
english: Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you.

arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
english: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

arabic: فَبِأَيِّ آلَاءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

arabic: هَلْ جَزَاءُ الْإِحْسَانِ إِلَّا الْإِحْسَانُ
english: Is the reward for good anything but good?

arabic: وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ
english: And He is with you wherever you are.

arabic: وَمَا الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا مَتَاعُ الْغُرُورِ
english: And what is the worldly life except the enjoyment of delusion.

arabic: سَابِقُوا إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ
english: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord.

arabic: يَرْفَعِ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنكُمْ وَالَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ دَرَجَاتٍ
english: Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees.

arabic: وَابْتَغُوا مِن فَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
english: And seek from the bounty of Allah, and remember Allah much that you may succeed.

arabic: وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
english: And upon Allah let the believers rely.

arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
english: And whoever relies upon Allah — then He is sufficient for him.

arabic: سَيَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
english: Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.

arabic: الَّذِي خَلَقَ الْمَوْتَ وَالْحَيَاةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا
english: Who created death and life to test you as to which of you is best in deed.

arabic: فَقُلْتُ اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
english: And said: Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

arabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَالٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَارًا
english: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.

arabic: وَاذْكُرِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
english: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with complete devotion.

arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَاءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
english: We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَاقِيهِ
english: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with exertion and will meet Him.

arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
english: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.

arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ فِي كَبَدٍ
english: We have certainly created man into hardship.

arabic: وَلَلْآخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ الْأُولَىٰ
english: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first.

arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰ
english: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ عَائِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
english: And He found you poor and made you self-sufficient.

arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
english: For indeed, with hardship will be ease.

arabic: إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
english: Indeed, with hardship will be ease.

arabic: فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَانصَبْ
english: So when you have finished, then stand up for worship.

arabic: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَارْغَبْ
english: And to your Lord direct your longing.

arabic: اقْرَأْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّكَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ
english: Recite in the name of your Lord who created.

arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُ
english: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it.

arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُ
english: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

arabic: وَالْعَصْرِ
english: By time.

arabic: إِنَّ الْإِنسَانَ لَفِي خُسْرٍ
english: Indeed, mankind is in loss.

arabic: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالصَّبْرِ
english: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

arabic: فَذَٰلِكَ الَّذِي يَدُعُّ الْيَتِيمَ
english: For that is the one who drives away the orphan.

arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ الْمِسْكِينِ
english: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.

arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
english: Say: He is Allah, the One.

arabic: اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ
english: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.

arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ
english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.

arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.
